name: spectral_width_of_radio_wave_in_air_scattered_by_air
description: The quantity with standard name spectral_width_of_radio_wave_in_air_scattered_by_air is the frequency width of the signal received by an instrument such as a radar or lidar. The signal returned to the instrument is the sum of all scattering from a given volume of air regardless of mechanism (examples are scattering by aerosols, hydrometeors and refractive index irregularities, or whatever else the instrument detects).
